programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: To keep a student congress from being used as a rubber stamp by a repressive premier (John Larch), the IMF sets Phelps up for capture so he can betray Paris as a turncoat student leader on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Carl Betz, Barbara Anderson, and Robert Conrad guest star alongside Jim Phelps who, with the aid of Barney's electronic wizardry, takes on the guise of a hot-shot pool hustler to break up an illegal gambling operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Joe Collins is a nuclear scientist who is made to believe that he is a prisoner in the year 2000 and is about to be executed as part of the IMF's plans to learn where he has hidden enough plutonium to construct a dozen atomic bombs.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Robert Webber guest stars as Charles Rogan, a syndicate leader with the key to the five million dollar bankroll that will finance the overthrow the government of Camagua.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits pediatrician Dr. Jane Breck, who shows young viewers what might happen during a child's routine checkup. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Cousin Mary Owl plans a cousin reunion!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how children are curious about families that are formed by adoption and talks about his family's adoption of his own sister. He shows a film about different families in his Neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sea World to see the families of penguins there. He talks about how every person in the world is different from everybody else. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, the cousin reunion takes place.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers builds several things on the sand table and talks about different ways to play. He shows a video of some of the many ways children like to play.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At Chef Brockett's bakery, Eva Kwong's grandmother makes special Chinese dumplings, and Mister Rogers talks about how children can learn about so many things from adults.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how people make wooden rocking horses. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Mr. Aber gets a mask that makes him look like King Friday, and the Neighbors talk about the importance of making and keeping friends.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows viewers a kitten named Jimmy and a film of Jimmy's birth, and assures viewers that "it's all right to wonder about things." Then, poet and essayist May Sarton visits.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers invites viewers along on a visit to a special new playground designed and built by both adults and children. He makes up a song at the piano.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces his television Neighbors to gymnast Chaney Umphrey when he visits at his gym and watches as he exercises. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, mischievous Lady Elaine Fairchilde reveals a mystery!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy factory where people make plastic molded tricycles, and he receives a visit from folk singer Ella Jenkins who collects toy tops from around the world.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers flies a balsa wood airplane, and Mr. McFeely visits an airport control tower. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday discovers that learning to ride a bike isn't always easy!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how empty containers plus some imagination can create a whole Neighborhood. In Make-Believe, Ana Platypus is jealous of Prince Tuesday's new bike and angry because her parents aren't buying one for her.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy lending library and sees children playing with different kinds of toys. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday learns to ride his bike, and also learns to share it!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a raincoat and talks about things to do inside. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Aberlin dances in the rain. X flies to slide down a rainbow. Daniel wants to learn Tai Chi to stop his scary dreams.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers hangs a fish mobile, then goes to see some killer whales swim and play. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine teaches dance and says males weren't invited to the studio because they don't dance.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sam Weber and sees him dance. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday XIII goes to Lady Elaine's dance school, and she turns him away claiming that men can't dance. Sam Weber arrives and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Nancy Caterpillar sees herself in a mirror and realizes that she is very special the way she is. She turns into a butterfly. Mister Rogers visits the circus and sees Jeff Gabel apply his clown make-up.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows pictures of the night and day skies. He plays with a star on a string and then remembers his trip to Moscow, where he met Russian children's television program producers. There is a pretend star falling from a string.

programme.desc: AV-8-Harrier jump jet; Ford Explorer-Firestone tire rollovers; offshore oil-rig fire; derailment of a high-speed train; computer errors almost set off nuclear war.

programme.desc: Sinking of Ocean Ranger offshore oil rig; plane carrying golfer Payne Stewart malfunctions; Connecticut Turnpike collapse; South Fork Dam failure; PEPCON jet fuel plant explosion.

programme.desc: Sinkholes; use of asbestos; Chang River flood; liquid natural-gas explosions; Hyatt Hotel walkway collapses.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Christmas observance by world's population incorporates trees, ornaments, lights, and treats made cheaper and safer through technology; explore Rockefeller Center preparations, Macy's holiday windows, UNICEF snowflake installation, and more.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the factory where the board game "Monopoly" is made; how "Masters of the Universe" action figures are making a comeback in a big way; how Mattel is using the latest technology to make new models of "Hot Wheels" come to life.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: CatDog

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Arenita tratan de ir a la luna en el cohete que Arenita construyó. / Don Cangrejo compra unas botas para Perlita pero se las da a Bob Esponja cuando Perlita no las aceptó.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja va con Perlita a un baile de su escuela. / Bob Esponja y Calamardo pelean para ver quién es el empleado del mes del Crustáceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Calamardo viaja sin querer en una máquina del tiempo. / Bob Esponja y Arenita pelean karate en todos los lugares y Bob debe evitar pelear en el Crustaceo Cascarudo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja y Arenita planean darle un hermoso regalo a Patricio en el día de San Valentín. / Bob Esponja juega con un trozo de papel que quiere Calamardo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock makes Luffy mad when she turns Margaret into a statue. The Snake Princess may have bitten off more than she can chew by challenging the captain of the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Snake Princess pits Luffy's Gum-Gum abilities against the incredible Haki power of her serpentine sisters in a fight to the death. Will Luffy survive long enough to save his statuesque friends?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks his attack mode into Second Gear to save a precious statue, and the snake sisters start to feel the Straw Hat heat. At the battle's climax, Luffy makes an impression on his opponents.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: News of Luffy's run-in with the Celestial Dragons impresses the Snake Princess, so she tells him the story of her tortured past. Will his honorable nature speed Luffy toward a reunion with his crew?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is mobbed by a hoard of pretty Kuja women eager to touch a real live man. Granny Nyon offers him a safe haven, but what she has to say might sink his plans for a Straw Hat reunion.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock's illness threatens to sabotage Luffy's rescue mission. However, the Snake Princess just can't say "no" to the rubber-man, so a plan to save Ace is quickly hatched.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy races to save Ace, Nami tries to survive life on Sky Island, and Franky dances up a snowstorm before making the switch from cola to tea!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper narrowly avoids being served for dinner in a land inhabited by giant birds, and Sanji's refined tastes land him a role as a leading lady on the island of girlish hearts.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nico Robin finds herself trapped on the island of Tequila Wolf: a miserable land where children are forced to work as slaves. Elsewhere, Usopp tries to survive a run-in with a man-eating plant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is held against his will by the pink-haired princess of bad vibes, Brook gets mistaken for the king of darkness, and Luffy continues to eat his way toward a reunion with Fire-Fist Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Boa arrive at Impel Down, but only thirty-three hours remain until Ace's execution. To save him, the Snake Princess must find a way to hide Luffy during her full-body search!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Time is running out on Ace, so Luffy teams up with a scoundrel who's going to pieces trying to escape Impel Down. There's no love lost between the former foes, but they'd better work together if they want to survive.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy must part ways with a priceless treasure map before Buggy the Clown agrees to lead him through the bloody tangle of Blade Trees and Spike Needle Grass that make up Impel Down's Crimson Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Buggy the Clown could end up as hippo food if they aren't careful in Impel Down's Wild Beast Hell. Of course, the rubber-man might find that a better fate than dealing with the prison's putrid warden!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew stumble upon a most peculiar village when they hitch a ride on a fire-breathing beetle. The natives are petrified of pirates, but they welcome the Straw Hats with open arms!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The citizens of Little East Blue throw in a feast in honor of the Straw Hats, but when the Amigo Pirates try to capture Boss the Beetle, Luffy and his crew will have to defend their new friends.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji prepare to do battle on behalf of Boss the Beetle, but Captain Largo of the Amigo Pirates counters with a deadly arsenal of nets to put the Straw Hat brawlers on lock down!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy kicks into Second Gear for his rematch with Largo, and Nami leads the islanders as they lay waste to the Amigo Pirates. Boss the Beetle may be safe for now, but someone sinister lurks behind the scenes.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy struggles to stay a step ahead of a prison patrol made up of hungry lions and poisonous scorpions! Meanwhile, Ace spends what could be his final hours swapping stories with a pirate who hates pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the guards struggle to squelch a violent prison uprising, Luffy and his fellow fugitives try to keep their cool in a level of Impel Down known as Starvation Hell!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Boa Hancock uses her ample assets to buy some private time for a clandestine chat with Ace. Meanwhile, Luffy needs help from a graceful friend to escape the jaws of a hungry Sphinx!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Bon are on the verge of reaching Level 4, but they didn't count on fighting a demonic, lightning-fast, devastatingly powerful Minotaur! To defeat this beast, they'll need help from a human candle and a deranged clown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy narrowly avoids a deadly dip in the boiling pool of blood, only to find himself face to face with Warden Magellan. Meanwhile, outside the prison walls, the marine fleet prepares for Whitebeard's onslaught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Warden Magellan is a monster of a man with a penchant for poisoning prisoners. To rescue Ace, Luffy must go toe to toe with this toxic terror, but how do you defeat a foe who's deadly to the touch?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's daring assault on the venomous warden of Impel Down leaves him struggling to stand up, but despite the lethal poison breaking down his body, the rubber-man kicks his rescue mission into Second Gear!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy hovers perilously on the verge of death, Bon Clay embarks on a suicidal rescue mission plagued by sub-zero temperatures and bloodthirsty wolves with a supremely savage disposition!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: No existing antidote can save Luffy from the poison coursing through his veins, yet Bon Clay refuses to give up. His final, fleeting hope is a mysterious miracle-worker rumored to have vanished into the Gates of Hell!

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead on the side of the road, detectives are faced with the possibility that the killer might have been one of the many partygoers ringing in the new year.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death while driving her sons home from a Thanksgiving celebration; the hunt for her killer leads to an unlikely suspect, making investigators realize her murder is not as random as it seems.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: Just after Christmas, a young couple is found murdered inside their Florida home; neighbors can't imagine the couple had been in the area long enough to make a mortal enemy; police uncover deeply personal details, and soon expose a deadly secret.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays
programme.desc: A beloved couple is found murdered inside their home on Christmas morning; a single palm print is left behind; investigators work tirelessly to match the print to a suspect, until a letter from prison takes the case on an unexpected course.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: An apartment fire proves to be arson set to cover up the murder of a young woman, but the discovery of a secret double life and unique evidence leads detectives to the killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A witness comes face to face with the killer of a small-town beautician, but despite having an eyewitness, it would take years and a surprise tip to lead detectives to who strangled a beloved member of the community.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a 4-year-old finds his great-grandparents melted, he runs for help, launching an investigation into their double murder; greed takes center stage as detectives unwind this heart-wrenching case that leads them to a suspect no one saw coming.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young woman disappears, leaving the community hoping for her safe return; when she is found murdered, a string of mysterious anonymous tips takes detectives into a toxic world of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A missing persons case becomes something much darker when a sick, sinister affair is uncovered, leading investigators to believe foul play is involved.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The mysterious shooting of a restaurateur with no solid suspects and no murder weapon leaves detectives in a lurch, but when financial motives come to light, an undercover operation and clever forensic investigation turn the case upside-down.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A military veteran is missing and a young student is murdered in what appears to be a crime of passion, but the discovery of a secret payout leads police on a wild chase.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The wife of a Marine, a pregnant dominatrix and a sex slave cross paths in a twisted tale of kidnapping, lies and murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mom does all she can to provide for her kids, including taking up with five sugar daddies to make ends meet, but when jealousy rears its ugly head, this mom winds up dead and her killer is not who you would expect.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Living Planet

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Space is vast, yet it is full of collisions. Gas and dust electrostatically flock together, and gravity takes over coalescing grains into rocks. Those rocks become boulders, then asteroids colliding again and again, striking planets and each other.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity keeps us on the ground and the planets in their orbits, yet we only notice it when it's not there. In space we cheat gravity; falling just as fast but missing the ground. Now this fundamental universal force is slowly giving up its secrets.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Interface
programme.desc: The interface between Earth and space is the Ionosphere, a region of rarified gas and charged particles. It is very important for radio communications, radar, satellite signals and global positioning. Yet we know so little about it.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Halfway through the heats and the competition is on fire, literally. The arena is out for revenge after another competitor inadvertently vandalises it. One robot commits the ultimate sin, attacking the benevolent Refbot.

programme.title: Robot Wars: Extreme
programme.desc: Six years on and the mechanical marvels only get more sophisticated, more brutal, and show less mercy. Watch in awe as robots from all over the country battle for the right to survive another week.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: One competitor achieves every flipper robot's dream in this episode's heats, rapidly ending the first round. Another robot refuses to go into the pit alone and takes down whoever they can get grip on.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Eight teams made up of families and friends from across the country put their homemade robots to the test inside a purpose-built arena, packed with arena hazards and four House Robots. The winner at the end will go forward to the grand-final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The huge axe of Robot Thor driven by Jason, a builder from Northampton, clashes with father-and-son team Will and Ian from Team Shockwave. A consultant cardiologist and his two sons cause a huge upset with their brand new untested robot.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An eclectic collection of homemade robots including Glitterbomb, designed by nine-year-old April, which comes complete with a huge pink axe. A team of students from Falkirk bring a robot made of wood with a petrol engine.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Former holiday camp bluecoats enter the competition with their `launcher' Apollo. Father and-son-team Kan-Opener have a robot with huge piercing claws. A team of engineering students have created a future tech machine called Sweeney Todd.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Featuring one of the most bizarre, but certainly the tallest robot ever seen on `Robot Wars', Gabriel, built by Mensa member Craig and his three sons. It has wheels as tall as a washing machine and a huge samurai sword.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Winner robots from rounds one through five battle it out in the arena, a wild card from the runners up throws a spanner in the works as it tries to overthrow attempts at glory.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A new spinner has something to prove and a family team pour blood, sweat and tears into keeping their robot wars dream alive. The robots compete through brutal group battles and fierce head to heads for a place in the heat final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The challenge for competitors is even tougher as the infamous House Robots have been let off the leash in a new twist. This is the second heat, and only one of the eight teams can go through to the series grand final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Four teams progress into a mini league going head to head in a bid for points. The top two teams will face each other in the heat final for the chance to secure their place in this series' grand final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This fourth heat is an explosive display of spinners as old favourites take on new hopefuls. They must dodge the arena hazards and the menacing new twist as house robots are unleashed to attack competitors and inflict maximum damage.

programme.desc: Taiki asks Makoto to appear on a cooking show with him. Usagi decides to tag along, but her clumsiness creates a huge mess at the TV studio.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre que ha sido destrozado por un contenedor de basura apenas se aferra a la vida; Al mismo tiempo, una monja anciana y una prostituta ebria y gritando entran a la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre adulto grita sin cesar sin razón, una madre joven está alerta pero helada, y un niño parece tener una sobredosis de drogas, pero lo niega.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una adolescente está sangrando internamente por un embarazo ectópico, pero niega haber tenido relaciones sexuales, por lo que su médico debe encontrar una manera inteligente de probar su embarazo antes de poder tratarla.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Dos pacientes tienen extrañas lesiones de pesca; un instructor de artes marciales sufre dolores abdominales; cuando las víctimas adolescentes de un accidente automovilístico llenan su pequeña sala de emergencias, un médico debe tomar decisiones críticas.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un paciente bebe agua, se desmaya. Una chica punk llega desesperada con su novio malherido. Accidente de coche de un adolescente.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una víctima de mordedura de serpiente puede morir en la sala de emergencias porque el antiveneno para salvar vidas es escaso

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una adolescente es atravesada por el cuello en una cerca de hierro; un paciente está convencido de que se está convirtiendo en un vampiro.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre entra en shock anafiláctico; un tipo rudo teme a las agujas; un hombre se apuñala con una espada ninja; Un paciente cree que necesita un exorcismo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los médicos usan un robot operado por un especialista en otro hospital para tratar a un niño de 7 años con convulsiones

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Quark returns to his home planet to confront his mother, who has broken the Ferengi law prohibiting females from earning a profit.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Held prisoner by a group under the leadership of rebel Jem'Hadar, Bashir and O'Brien clash over Bashir's desire to help their captors escape Dominion rule.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When a tragic accident causes Sisko to vanish before his son's eyes, young Jake begins a lifelong obsession to bring him back.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: After returning to where they left the Enterprise and finding only the scattered remains of their ship, Trip and Reed struggle to survive and hope for rescue with only a few days worth of oxygen left inside Shuttlepod One.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Encountering a group of Vulcan pilgrims on a mission to explore their emotions, T'Pol is enticed to attempt some of their technique with a handsome and charming pilgrim, Tolaris.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer and his crew encounter a group of alien hunters upon a rogue planet that has broken out of its orbit.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: The entire Enterprise crew is knocked unconscious by a plundering Ferengi crew through a Trojan horse gas canister, leaving the ship to be easily ransacked.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: From a visiting alien ship, a fibrous, web-like creature secures itself inside an Enterprise launch bay and ensnares several crewmen. Hoshi must work to learn the creature's bizarre language in order to save the trapped crewmen.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: Archer must delay the crew's much-needed shore leave to transport a Vulcan Ambassador from her planet of Mazar to rendezvous with a Vulcan ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: T'Pol relates a tale of the Vulcans real First Contact when she claims that a relative of hers crash-landed in Carbon Creek, Pennsylvania in 1957, mingled with the townsfolk, and rescued workers in a mining accident.

programme.title: Star Trek: Enterprise
programme.desc: When Enterprise is struck by a soon-to-detonate weapon and lodges in the ship's hull, Reed must deactivate it, but his subsequent injury and a group of encroaching Romulans bent on destruction force Archer think creatively to save the crew and ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.desc: Troi, Riker and Dr. Crusher fall into unexplained comas while the Enterprise plays host to an alien race.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard's efforts to save a genetically engineered society from a natural disaster threaten to destroy it.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While suffering an unexplained case of amnesia, the crew finds themselves fighting a war they do not remember or understand.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: A rescue mission leads to a dangerous romance between Riker and a rebellious member of an androgynous race.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise is trapped in a time warp that forces the crew to endlessly repeat the same experiences.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After the Doctor adds a mix of new sub-routines to his program, his personality turns violent.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: While Paris makes a daring flight into a subspace energy storm, the Doctor experiences the joys and sorrows of family life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew must say goodbye to one member of their family just as they are adjusting to a new one.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: On a flight back to Atlantis, McKay inexplicably falls ill. Fearing the worst, the doctor summons McKay’s sister to say her goodbyes. But Ronan tells Jeannie of a shrine that would grant Rodney one day to be himself again, before he dies.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Dr. Beckett (Paul McGillion) is asked to delay his departure from Atlantis when word comes that Major Anne Teldy (Christina Cox) and her away team have stumbled onto one of Michael’s abandoned labs inside an extensive underground catacomb.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Keller and the Atlantis team meet with the Wraith, Todd, to deliver a startling proposition. Keller believes she has found a cure for the Wraiths of their need to feed on humans but requires a test subject for this breakthrough treatment.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay and Ronan volunteer to assist Dr. Jennifer Keller with a medical follow-up away from Atlantis. Later, when the pair return to her, they are surprised to learn that she left earlier but a search of the village turns up no sign of her.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Stargate SG-1’s Dr. Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) travels to Atlantis when his research suggests that a rebellious Ancient scientist named Janus (Gildart Jackson) may have hidden a secret lab somewhere within the city.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Jackson and McKay have reactivated the Attero device, an ancient machine designed to annihilate the Wraith. In doing so, they discover the reason the device was ultimately abandoned… Meanwhile, Todd continues to hold the Daedalus crew captive.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Col. Sheppard and his team locate Dr. Carson Beckett on an alien planet where he is treating a small group of survivors of the Hoffan plague. But that same evening, a party of Wraith warriors arrives, threatening total annihilation.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A newly formed galactic coalition extends an invitation to Lt. Col. John Sheppard and his team to represent Atlantis at their next meeting. But on arrival, the team is immediately detained and must stand trial for crimes against humanity.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the Destiny still out of power, a plan is born to abandon the ship using the last working shuttle, in hopes that another planet will be habitable. But hope is short-lived when the only way to determine who will go and who will stay is a lottery.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Despite severe rationing and around-the-clock security, the water reserves onboard the Destiny continue to drop. Dr. Nicholas Rush has no explanation for this latest setback but, if they are to survive, they must find a new water source soon.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the situation onboard the Destiny dire, General O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and Homeworld Command order Col. Young to execute a high-risk plan concocted by the IOA scientists which, in theory, could return the crew to Earth.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After making a surprising discovery on a jungle planet, members of the team become ill. In an attempt to isolate the infection, the team sets up camp in the jungle. But when night falls, the illness will be the least of their worries.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 finds the planet where they believe the Sangraal is. Forced to forge temporary alliances with Adria (guest star Morena Baccarin) and Ba'al (guest star Cliff Simon) they undertake a quest to find it. Starring Ben Browder and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Discovering the frozen body of Merlin (guest star Matthew Walker), SG-1 works to help him build the Sangraal before Adria (guest star Morena Baccarin) and her Ori army can track them down. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Divorce attorney Holly (Kristen Johnston) sets up newly single Stuart with also divorced roommates: Phil (Donald Faison) and Haskell (Wayne Knight). After a rocky start with Stuart, the unlikely team helps him come to terms with his new unmarried life.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) uses Holly's assistant to help him land a star jockey as a client, but he's got his eyes on a bigger prize. Haskell (Wayne Knight) talks Stuart into selling sentimental mementos from his marriage but Stuart has trouble letting go.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell (Wayne Knight) panics when his online girlfriend surprises him with a visit because he used Phil's (Donald Faison) picture as his own. Holly discovers a homeless man in the laundry room and learns appearances can be very deceiving.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart's (David Alan Basche) work life is turned upside down when Phil (Donald Faison) sleeps with his dental assistant. Holly (Kristen Johnston) lends Eden (Kelly Stables) some outfits and soon discovers her clothes have a better social life than her.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Stuart's favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil's ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly (Kristen Johnston), determined to find Stuart (David Alan Basche) a date, introduces him to a woman who turns out to be a true professional. Haskell (Wayne Knight) invents a fabulous online lifestyle for himself in order to one-up his ex-wife.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) meets a foreign lingerie model who doesn't speak English and Stuart (David Alan Basche) has to act as interpreter. Eden helps Holly overcome a bad first impression with a handsome neighbor. Haskell buys a coffin as an investment.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison), Stuart (David Alan Basche), and Haskell (Wayne Knight) are forced to trade apartments with Holly (Kristen Johnston) when her mother (Judith Light) comes for a visit because Holly never told her mother her engagement ended months ago.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience

programme.title: Moesha

programme.title: Moesha

programme.title: Moesha

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: An old boyfriend of Andell’s comes back into her life and proposes to her. Moesha tries to keep Andell and Moesha’s Uncle Bernie together before it’s too late.

programme.title: Moesha

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: It’s Moesha’s 18th birthday, and as a surprise, her family and friends unknowingly invite all of Moesha’s past boyfriends to the party.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: When Moesha’s car breaks down, she, Hakeem, and Niecy are late for their graduation ceremony.

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: A frustrated Moesha longs for a promotion from 'gopher' to writer at Vibe magazine but believes that her boss, Joe Scott, would rather she pay her dues with something other than her writing talent.

programme.title: Moesha

programme.title: Moesha
programme.desc: Unable to resist the temptations of college life, Moesha and Niecy become regulars on the party circuit, until their attendance at a late-night frat party takes its toll in more ways than one.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Víctor convence a Marisa de que Cristóbal y Sara son amantes. Estanislao le adelanta al candidato que meterse en Queens no le será tan fácil y Cristóbal enfrenta a Calixta por los negocios. A los Parker les llega una enfermera particular.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma y Jimena llegan a la hacienda y se enteran de la traición de Eva, Fernando y Sara quieren denunciarla a ella y a los Reyes, mientras Gabriela retiene a sus hijas para protegerlas.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Se arma una fuerte pelea cuando los Reyes llegan a la hacienda para hablar con Norma y Jimena. Eva se va de la hacienda por orden de Fernando y Raquel le prohíbe que se acerque a su hija Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando ordena un ataque contra los hermanos Reyes, Franco encuentra una oportunidad para revertir la desgracia de su familia después de perder a Rosario. Norma se empeña en olvidar a Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco firma los documentos que lo acreditan como el propietario de la fortuna de Eduvina Trueba, aunque Juan persuade a su hermano para evitar que arruine su vida con una mujer mayor que él.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Eduvina no sigue las órdenes de su médico, Franco tampoco calma su euforia y las consecuencias son inevitables. Juan y Óscar quieren irse del pueblo, imaginan a su hermano en una luna de miel.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm y Carmela humillan a Franco y acusan a Eva de ladrona, ella se entera de que Reyes es dueño de la hacienda y busca a sus hermanos. Juan obliga al viudo de Eduvina a poner todo en su sitio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco le pide ayuda a Juan y a Óscar, su hermano mayor se niega hasta que Eva lo convence para que acepte. Jimena consigue trabajo, Fernando llega con Pepita a la hacienda Elizondo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Los Reyes asumen sus responsabilidades en la hacienda, pasan los meses y Norma da a luz a su bebé, Jimena tiene éxito en su trabajo aunque extraña a Óscar, él no aguanta los celos al verla.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan acepta la decisión de su hermano porque es la oportunidad para acercarse a Norma, ella se preocupa cuando ve a Fernando con su bebé. Jimena le muestra a Ruth unas fotos de Libia.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita se encuentra con el nuevo dueño de la hacienda Trueba, con quien tiene una fuerte discusión, ella cae del caballo y se desmaya, cuando despierta está en la habitación de Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sarita y Franco pelean de nuevo, esta vez delante de todos los invitados a la fiesta en honor a los Reyes. Juan muere de celos al ver a Fernando con Gabriela, teme que Norma haya vuelto con él.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan conoce a su hijo y lo toma en sus brazos con ternura, Gabriela arma un escándalo hasta que Norma aclara que él tiene derechos porque es el padre, luego ella desacata la orden de su madre.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.desc: Teams must drum up enough strength for an intense head-to-head battle before checking into the mat.

programme.desc: The Teams travel to Switzerland where they free-fall over 400 feet into the Gletscherschlucht Glacier Gorge.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams try not to crack while transporting eggs across town by bicycle in the Netherlands.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack – whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons – the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: George Orwell's concept of Big Brother remains in the realm of fiction. But as technology becomes more a part of our lives, it's becoming increasingly more difficult to make a move without leaving behind an electronic trace.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A friendly Midwest lodge becomes the scene of a gruesome double murder. Two men are dead and a safe filled with cash is missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After being foreman of a jury that convicted an Apache, Lucas is marked for death. Now, he must discover who is behind the curse.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas allows some snowed-in stagecoach passengers to stay with him until the roads are passable. Trouble brews when the whiskey salesman and gunfighter fall for the same woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two pranksters write away for a mail-order bride, using Lucas's name.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas recognizes Dr. Battle as an ex-gunslinger with whom he once fought. He helps with a dying man, but Lucas and the doctor have unresolved anger.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A Chinese man and his son fight prejudice as they try to open a laundry in North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Lucas and Mark are traveling across the Mexican desert they encounter a trio of Mexican bandits who demand payment to cross "their" desert.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark takes a job as a stable boy against his father's wishes.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Milly are held hostage in her general store when two gunmen attempt a daring robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Two prison wagon drivers stop at the McCain ranch looking for whiskey. Lucas turns them down because they are escorting a murderer, to be hanged in Yuma.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark goes to work for Will Temple, a badly scarred, very mysterious rancher.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Corey Hazlett insists he's innocent of murder, despite Lucas's eyewitness testimony.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to dissuade a latter-day knight from rushing into battle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Abe Lincoln's claim that he's the Great Emancipator amuses everyone except Matt Yordy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Stubborn Grandpa Fogarty is Lucas's main roadblock as he tries to get young Woody Fogarty to attend school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark Twain visits North Fork and quickly alienates the townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to stop embittered John Holliver from venting his wrath on the people who expelled him from town years before.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes the target of a vengeful mountaineer after he is responsible for a young mountain boy's death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark is kidnapped and held for ransom, he finds himself an unwilling companion of gunman Carl Avery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas seeks an escape when he's captured by outlaws while seeking help for an injured Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The young Queen-to-be of France hides out in North Fork with her sick brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A notorious killer is being held in the North Fork jail. When word gets around that Gordo's gang is on its way to free him, the whole town becomes frightened.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's old Army pal settles in North Fork with his deaf daughter.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Englishman arrives with a custom-made rifle and a plan to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark falls head-over-heels in puppy love.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Banker Hamilton is closing up for the day when Rudy Gray persuades him to stay open for one more transaction...a withdrawal at gunpoint.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Tip Corey, the son of a man allegedly murdered in North Fork, has a killer's reputation and comes to town to kill Micah.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Len Richards and his brother, Ab, confront a Lucas McCain look-alike, Earl Bantry and his sidekick K.C. Peters, for slaughtering one of Richards' steers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mike Ferris finds himself in a town strangely devoid of people. But despite the emptiness, he has the odd feeling that he's being watched...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A street salesman cleverly eludes Death. But if he lives, a little girl must die in his place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A has-been, drunk gunslinger finds his fast-draw abilities magically restored.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging, former movie star lives and dreams in the past, constantly watching her old movies alone in her room.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hypochondriac exchanges his soul for immortality and indestructibility.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Corry is stranded on an asteroid after being convicted of a crime. He receives as a present a robot who looks, sounds, and acts like a real woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bank teller, Henry Bemis, longs for time alone to read books. He gets his wish...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrified of falling asleep for fear he might die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In 1942, a German wonders why he's on the deck of a British steamship, with no memory of how he got there, and an overwhelming sense of impending doom.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts have returned from this first space flight. Major Gart is hospitalized with a broken leg. The other two, Colonels Harrington and Forbes head for a bar. Harrington gets a strange feeling…

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A two-bit thug thinks he's found the key to a better life in an old sidewalk salesman who has the uncanny ability to tell people what they need the most.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man who can change his face to resemble others gets into hot water with gangsters.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: With all-out nuclear war about to ignite, a scientist and his pilot friend plot to escape on an experimental spaceship.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts crash on what they believe to be an asteroid. Unfortunately they have only limited water supplies to sustain them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alone on a cross-country trip, a woman continually sees the same hitch-hiker everywhere she looks.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Tight fisted Franklin Gibbs is not pleased when his wife wins a trip for two to Las Vegas. But things change when he falls under the spell of a slot machine that calls his name.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A World War I flying ace flies through a mysterious cloud - and lands at a modern U.S. air base in the year 1959!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Lt. Fitzgerald has found his own special wartime hell. Looking into the faces of his men prior to battle, he has the disquieting ability to see who is about to die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Three astronauts land on what looks like Earth 200 years before they left--only all of the people seem frozen in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Millicent Barnes sees her double at a bus terminal.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paranoia strikes the residents of Maple Street when they believe human-looking aliens have invaded the neighborhood.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Walter Jameson is an excellent history teacher who talks about the past as if he had lived it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a space exploration crashes on Mars, the surviving passenger is surprised to find that Martians are human-looking, very friendly and apparently just like us...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An over-the-hill boxer gets a boost from one of his biggest fans - a little boy with an unwavering belief in magic.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.desc: Andrea concierta un encuentro entre Rick y el Gobernador para que negocien la paz, pero el Gobernador exige la cabeza de Michonne a cambio del alto el fuego.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne ve a Glenn y Maggie buscando provisiones, pero alguien más los observa: Merle, quien reconoce a Glenn como uno de los que le abandonó, a merced de los zombis, en una azotea de Atlanta. Entretanto, Rick sigue mentalmente inestable.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne conduce a Rick, Daryl y Oscar a Woodbury para rescatar a Glenn y Maggie, a quienes el Gobernador está torturando para sonsacarles dónde se oculta el grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An over-ambitious general plans to rise to the presidency of the U.S. because of his reputation as a ruthless Indian fighter.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon struggle to bring to justice a weirdly garbed, artillery-equipped gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A murderer trapped by agent James T. West breaks out of prison with a bizarre plan to assassinate him.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter voodoo rites and a diabolical biologist and his throng of robot-like slaves.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon face a killer beast and a mystery guarded by a senator and his three sons.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A would-be dictator's attempt to assassinate President Ulysses S. Grant brings him up against secret agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A double-dealing foreign diplomat attempts to implicate the United States in an international conspiracy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A man uses a steam-driven juggernaut to drive off homesteaders so he can appropriate their oil-rich land.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon come across a physician plying a wealthy family with a drug that causes rapid aging.

programme.desc: The Bermuda Triangle traps Mulder aboard a 1939 luxury liner with Nazis.

programme.desc: Scully pursues a photographer.

programme.desc: Cassandra Spender mysteriously reappears.

programme.desc: The agents attempt to prevent an alien invasion of Earth.

programme.title: The X-Files

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowners begin to demo. The architect shares his plan for the home. Richard learns about the Saratoga springs. The yard is protected against construction. An air remediation system is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The Saratoga Racecourse is toured. Discoveries are made during demo. Armored shield cabling is replaced with nonmetallic ones. The home's framing is explored. A buttress wall is built in the basement.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Local gardens are toured. A new foundation is built using ICFs. A mansion once owned by the inventor of a fire hydrant valve is toured. Forms are prepped for a pour-in-place concrete staircase.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The original foundation is repointed. Plumbing fixture choices are made. A ledger is installed on the new ICF foundation for the mudroom floor joists. A truss manufacturing facility is toured.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Brick veneer is installed at the Dracut Centre School. The homeowners select cabinets at a local kitchen showroom. Mold and mildew are identified and treated. Kevin takes a hot air balloon ride.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old joists are replaced. Tile selections are made. The old porch is tied into the new framing. Steel I-beams support the open floor plan with no partitions. The roof trusses are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Coffered ceilings hide plumbing pipes. A central staircase being constructed. A drain plain is created for the porch, and a diffusion vent is installed on the roof. The crew ends the day on the ice.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The house has undergone a dramatic transformation. The electrical and HVAC service is upgraded. An old window gets new life. Kevin is taught welding. The house is ready for insulation.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A wet tap is performed for the run of new water lines. A fire sprinkler system and slate hearth are installed inside. Doghouse dormers are made watertight and sided.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A tech school is visited. At the house, floors are going down. A custom drain pan is built for the laundry room. The new irrigation system is discussed. The ICF foundation gets a stucco-like finish.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Pocket doors are discussed. Painting advice is given. Old chalkboards are restored at the Dracut Centre School. Pantry cabinets, soaker tub, and kitchen lighting are installed at the house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: It's a wrap on the 158-year-old Dutch Colonial that has been in the same family for seven generations. The homeowners give the crew a tour of the new spaces. Tom presents a gift to the homeowner.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: It's the start of a new project in South Atlanta, GA. It's an 1890s Victorian that once belonged to a civil rights activist. The This Old House team meets the homeowners, builder, and project manager.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: It's demolition day at the house in South Atlanta. The homeowners' daughter learns to use power tools to build a lending library. An ivy-covered oak overhanging the roof is safely trimmed back.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A stem wall foundation is poured, and a custom wallpaper is designed. The homeowner installs a vapor barrier in the crawl space and tours an outdoor school for backyard inspiration.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new interior spaces are toured. The HVAC ducting is installed. Kitchen location options are explored, and the old windows are restored. The homeowners' daughter creates a 3d tour of the house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Interior framing is almost complete. Siding is installed on the exterior. A major motion picture studio is visited. The house is protected from lightning strikes. The Dracut Centre School is restored.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old porch posts are repaired. The bathrooms get a new wall treatment. Ceiling joists are left exposed ceiling. The homeowners choose a front door and visit Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.'s home.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The front door is stripped of paint. The HVAC system is connected and tested. Floating shelves are installed. The brick steps are repaired. An herb garden is planted, and the custom wallpaper is hung.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1890s Victorian house in Atlanta once owned by South Atlanta's first black postmaster was a dilapidated and abandoned structure. Now, it has been restored and the crew is back for a tour.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The crew is back in Massachusetts to start a new project—a modest 1902 Victorian in the town of Newburyport. They meet the homeowners, tour the project, and discuss the possible challenges.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The main power is disconnected, and temporary power is run before demo begins. Asbestos abatement is performed. The back bump out is removed. A carpenter talks about working with Parkinson's disease.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work is underway for the new three-story bump out, the interior is demolished, and a new winder staircase is built. A retaining wall is built, and the town wastewater treatment facility is toured.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Shingles are installed on a small roof valley. Exterior windows are trimmed with a prefabricated trim system. The homeowners make design selections. The railing on the original staircase is raised.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Curb appeal is added to the front yard. A custom desk is built using off-the-shelf material. An electric vehicle charger is installed, and the secret to achieving a high gloss paint finish is shared.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Renovation on the 1902 house is done and the homeowners are ready to move in, but first, the crew and homeowners participate in the town's annual bed race. After, they meet at the house for a tour.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The crew takes on a first period home in the town of Ipswich, MA. A brief history on heating first period homes is given. The homeowners get a lesson on how to properly salvage the old floors.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Accident-prone Cindy appears to have taken the ultimate misstep when she starts collecting maternity clothes, leading Jack to make an astonishingly funny marriage proposal. Guest Star(s): Frances Lee McCain

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A surprise visit by the battling Ropers turns into a romantic triangle when lusty Helen seeks solace from Jack and Janet and lands in the arms of Ralph Furley. Guest Star(s): Norman Fell and Audra Lindley

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack poses as his own twin to romance Ralph Furley's attractive visiting niece.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack gets a preview of the great hereafter when Larry hatches a plan to save him from his girl's murderously jealous other boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet turn detectives when Cindy mysteriously vanishes and crazy clues indicate that their bouncy roommate has met with foul play.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack's never-ending schemes to endear himself to a beautiful woman totally backfire, he decides to forego his little white lies for honesty.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet find a new roommate after Cindy moves off to dormitory life at nearby UCLA. She's Terri Alden, an emergency room nurse who starts off on the wrong foot with Jack in this sixth-season opener.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry has made his choice for a new roommate and Jack and Larry begin devising a plan to get rid of Terri.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: To boost Jack's confidence, Terri turns on the charm, causing Janet to suspect that her new roommate's interest in Jack is more than platonic.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri thinks an attractive older woman's visit to Jack are weekly lessons in lovemaking and, in disgust, decides to move out.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri and Jack believe that Janet will have to make it with her dance instructor if she wants to make it as a dancer.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack breaks a date with Janet to coach a nervous Larry, who's hoping to romance Terri with a smooth conversation.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet mistake Terri's psychiatric friend for an escapee from a hospital psychiatric ward.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Aaron Pryor vs Alexis Arguello

programme.title: Artur Beterbiev vs Oleksandr Gvozdyk

programme.title: Bernard Hopkins vs Kelly Pavlik

programme.title: Bernard Hopkins vs Oscar De La Hoya

programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots are banished from Earth, placed in a spacecraft and set on a crash course for the Sun due to a plan by Megatron and human industrialist Sean Burger. With the Autobots gone, the Decepticons are free to do as they please.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: As the Autobots watch over the powerful Negavator prototype weapon for the military, an attack, and accident leaves Red Alert malfunctioning and paranoid of his fellow Autobots. Confused, he strikes a partnership with the evil Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. The Autobots and Decepticons begin to malfunction, losing their powers due to a lack of the compound Cybertronium on Earth. But the Dinobots are fully functional and in no need of Cybertronium, and the Dinobot Grimlocks has plans of his own!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Spike and Carlee are stranded on Cybertron, desperate to find the Cybertronium needed to heal the ailing Autobots on Earth. Their only hope is to free the Dinobots, who are on Cybertron under the control of Shockwave's brainwashing program.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When Starscream inadvertently activates a time machine, he and his fellow Decepticons are sent back to medieval times. Luckily Spike, Hoist, and Warpath follow them back, and with help from Merlin, they are prepared to defend the kingdom from them.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Crash-landing on the moon Titan, the Decepticons trick the population into believing they are “Sky Gods” and that the people should serve them. Desperate to free her people, a brave girl sends an S.O.S. to the Autobots…but will they arrive in time?

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth’s core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To stop the Decepticons from drilling into Earth's core, the Autobots hijack and reprogram the mighty Devastator to use against them. But when they lose control of the giant, the only hope for survival is for the Autobots and Decepticons to work together!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Autobot Tracks is damaged while trying to help authorities investigate a plague of car thefts in New York City. Once he is repaired by his human friend Raoul, the two uncover a Decepticon plan to turn the cars into an unstoppable Decepticon army!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race. While they are racing, Megatron is given the perfect opportunity to use his latest weapon - the Transfixation Ray, a device that locks the Autobots into car mode, unable to change back to robot form.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Insecticons have multiplied into an army of thousands. The huge swarms feed on everything in their path, even blocking out the sun! Desperate for a solution, Cosmos, Bumblebee, and Spike travel to a far-off planet in search of a robotic insecticide.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world where they are no larger than an alien child's play toy. Suddenly the smallest household nuisances are the Autobots' biggest threats!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated. Their only chance for survival is an alliance between Smokescreen and a shady alien space captain planning to win big on the Monicus Asteroid, site of the best casino in the universe.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Thought to be extinct, four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes. When their team leader Aleta-1 is captured, Megatron uses her to force Optimus Prime to surrender himself.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub, "Dancitron" opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons. After his break-dancing crew gets run off by the club's security, Raoul gets some backup from his trusted Autobot friends.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist. When Autobot Powerglide embarks on a high-altitude mission to save her, they form a bond that will keep his spirits flying high… even in the middle of a Decepticon fight.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Returning to Tombstone with lawyer Gay Monahan, Hollister is just in time to prevent a gunfight between mine owner Big Jim Gerson and his manager, Feeny Spindler. Spindler hires the lady lawyer who digs up some surprising facts and a frozen body.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister investigates a series of mysterious deaths among the silver miners and links Lily Murdock, the town's most respected woman, with the tragedies. Lily is so well-liked by the townspeople that the sheriff dares not accuse her openly.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Marshal Vern Fawcett turns in his badge after accidentally shooting an outlaw in the back. When Holcomb's three vengeful brothers ride into Tombstone, Sheriff Hollister helps Fawcett regain his courage for the fight against lawlessness.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Hollister rushes a young, wounded hoodlum to Tombstone's hospital, putting him under the care of nurse Mary Rice. But when the notorious Gayleyville gang kidnaps her and the dying boy, Hollister and the wounded man each attempt to save the nurse.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Fragments of the Epitaphs are found at the scene of a robbery and on the body of a known killer. Hollister and Claibourne discover a strange code in the help wanted ads and, with a planned typographic 'error,' they smoke out a robbery gang.

programme.title: Bat Masterson
